# Dialog

Displays modal content in a focus-trapped overlay.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/dialog
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="dialog"
  example={0}
  code={`<Dialog.Root>
  <Dialog.Trigger>Open dialog</Dialog.Trigger>
  <Dialog.Content>
    <Dialog.Title>Confirm changes</Dialog.Title>
  </Dialog.Content>
</Dialog.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<Dialog.Root>
  <Dialog.Trigger>Open dialog</Dialog.Trigger>
  <Dialog.Content>
    <Dialog.Title>Confirm changes</Dialog.Title>
  </Dialog.Content>
</Dialog.Root>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="dialog"
  example={1}
  code={`<Dialog.Root>
  <Dialog.Trigger>Settings</Dialog.Trigger>
  <Dialog.Content>
    <Dialog.Header>
      <Dialog.Title>Settings</Dialog.Title>
      <Dialog.Description>Manage your preferences.</Dialog.Description>
    </Dialog.Header>
    <Dialog.Footer>
      <Dialog.Close>Cancel</Dialog.Close>
    </Dialog.Footer>
  </Dialog.Content>
</Dialog.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<Dialog.Root>
  <Dialog.Trigger>Settings</Dialog.Trigger>
  <Dialog.Content>
    <Dialog.Header>
      <Dialog.Title>Settings</Dialog.Title>
      <Dialog.Description>Manage your preferences.</Dialog.Description>
    </Dialog.Header>
    <Dialog.Footer>
      <Dialog.Close>Cancel</Dialog.Close>
    </Dialog.Footer>
  </Dialog.Content>
</Dialog.Root>
```
